If the release takes place on the Southern side of the lunar
disc, it is called the Daksinakukfibheda—Break of the right belly. In
consequence of this there will be trouble to the princes and conflict
with the enemies living to the south.
[Cf. Kasyapa—

If the end of the eclipse occurs on the Northern side of the
Moon's disc, it is termed Vamakuksibheda—Break of the left belly.
As a result of this women will have miscarriages and the crops
will be moderate.
[Cf. Kasyapa—
According to this Sage there will be in addition the destruc-
tion of the king who rules over the territory in the north].
xtiimt snSr m^U
Should the liberation take place on the South-western side of
the Moon's disc, it would be designated as DaksinapUyubheda—
